title: elaphrium pannosum
intro: Elaphrium pannosum, also known as Indian wicker or Elaphrium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphrium pannosum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Elaphrium pannosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as ointments and poultices.
